finding.title: SQL injection in order lookup
finding.summary: The order-lookup endpoint concatenates the `orderId` request parameter directly into a SQL query, allowing injection.
finding.impact: An attacker can read or modify arbitrary order and payment records.
finding.recommended_fix: Use a parameterized query / prepared statement for the orderId lookup.

finding.title: Missing authorization on refund endpoint
finding.summary: The /refund endpoint does not verify that the authenticated user owns the order being refunded.
finding.impact: Any authenticated user can issue refunds for other users' orders.
finding.recommended_fix: Enforce an ownership check (order.userId == principal.id) before processing refunds.
